items.title: Train Crashes Into Bangkok Traffic, Killing at Least 8
items.summary: A freight train plowed into traffic on train tracks, starting a fire. The authorities did not immediately give a cause but said a barrier had not come down.

items.title: Rs 30,000 For 3rd Child, Rs 40,000 For 4th: Chandrababu Naidu's Population Incentive
items.summary: The Andhra Pradesh chief minister said rising incomes are leading to some couples giving birth to only one child.
